chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-3654 of 2021 & Const. Petition No.D-5024 of 2021 ______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Priority: 1. For hearing of Misc. No.15256/2021 (Stay). 2. For hearing of main case. 11.12.2024 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, Advocate for petitioner along with Ms. Saima Syed, Advocate. Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, Advocate for respondent No.2. On 10.12.2024, following order was passed:- “Per learned counsel for the petitioners vide order dated 11.06.2021, it was ordered that re-test of fresh samples would be undertaken prior to release of the consignment and the matter shall be decided subject to the report therein. Learned counsel for the department undertakes to submit compliance report in respect of order dated 11.06.2021. For the said purpose adjourned to 11.12.2024. In case the report is not submitted the respondent No.2- Collector of Customs, M.C.C. Appraisement (West) shall be in attendance personally. This order shall be communicated by Mr. Mohabat Hussain Awan, advocate.” Today, statement has been filed along with copies of the relevant lab test report. In view hereof the respective learned counsel jointly state that these petitions may be disposed of with direction to the Collectorate to decide the issue in the light of the aforesaid fresh lab test report through a speaking order and after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Order accordingly. Both these petitions are disposed of. Copy of this order may be placed in the connected petition. Judge Judge Nadeem
